_doc: Visual patterns the user has explicitly rejected. Visual Oracle must penalize these. Updated after each session's wisdom phase.

rejected_patterns.context: User said '그림자 제거' — shadow-lg, shadow-md on card surfaces is visual noise
6+ border-b dividers flagged as decorative spam in editorial redesign
Oracle recommended +8 delta but user explicitly rejected as too predictable/dated
Recurring issue across multiple sessions. Even col-span-2 on one item doesn't fix if any row has 3 equal items

rejected_patterns.pattern: whileInView on body sections creating invisible void
rejected_patterns.context: 3500px of blank space in Playwright fullPage capture. Use animate with delay instead
Every section same vertical rhythm = monotonous. Vary padding per section
Too many centered sections reads as AI default. At least 40% should be left-aligned or asymmetric
LILA BAN — the single most recognizable AI default color combination
Anti-slop verifier flags external placeholders. Use CSS gradients or local SVG

validated_approaches.pattern: per-section Code Oracle verify during execution
validated_approaches.context: Caught motion.width animation live — cheap loop, high value

validated_approaches.pattern: single bundled PR for editorial polish
validated_approaches.context: User confirmed splitting would be churn for this type of work
Subtle hover-only shadow is acceptable — not the same as static shadow on surfaces
